mapper.insert:
SELECT notification_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO notifications ( notification_id, question_id, member_id, type, message ) VALUES ( #{notificationId}, #{questionId}, #{memberId}, #{type}, #{message} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE member_id=#{memberId} AND is_read='N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE member_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE member_id=#{memberId} AND is_read='N'
